command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Restart openclaw with new token ==="
systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway && echo restarted
echo "Waiting 30s for telegram provider to settle..."
sleep 30

echo "=== Telegram startup - clean? (no Conflict, no spam) ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "35 seconds ago" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram|conflict|polling|provider|exited" | tail -10

echo ""
echo "=== Conflict count (must be 0) ==="
journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --since "35 seconds ago" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -c Conflict

echo ""
echo "=== Gateway active + port up ==="
systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway
ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 9119 >/dev/null && echo "9119 listening"
REMOTE
